title: Big challenge for Pacaltsdorp United
description: GEORGE NEWS - The SWD T20 champions,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The SWD T20 champions, Pacaltsdorp United, will be eager to become the first club from the SWD to represent the Western Cape at the Cricket South Africa T20 Community Cup.

Pacaltsdorp United, together with Durbanville Cricket Club (Western Province) and Paarl Cricket Club (Boland), will battle for the honour of becoming part of the final group that will participate in Pretoria in December.


> Pacaltsdorp will play Paarl this Saturday at 14:30 and the hosts, Durbanville, on Sunday at 10:00.


The squad of Pacaltsdorp for the weekend are: Bradley Carolus, Pieter Stuurman, George van Heerden, Matthew Thorne, Anoxolo Kitshini, Leroi Breden-kamp (captain), Liyabona Malife, Grant Simpson, Angus Christiaans, Randy Wesso, Ricardo Majolla, Duren Felix and Robin Hector.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
